title: The First Chatbot’s Multiple Personalities
summary: ELIZA is remembered as the world’s first AI star, a kindly therapist in chatbot form that gently probed users’ worries. Even its creator, Joseph Weizenbaum, was surprised by the warm reception given to his experiment in human-machine interaction. title_cn: 第一个聊天机器人的多重性格
summary_cn: ELIZA 被认为是世界上第一位人工智能明星，是一位以聊天机器人形式出现的友善治疗师，可以温和地探究用户的担忧。就连它的创造者 Joseph Weizenbaum 也对它受到的热烈欢迎感到惊讶。
